title: IT Vendor Extension — Pending RFP Award from 26-28 Responses
summary: Dave Proek (Director of IT) presents item 32, requesting extension of an existing local IT vendor agreement. An RFP was issued in August with 26-28 responses currently being scored. The extension bridges service until the new award is finalized.
raw_content:
[00:38:58] director of IT. Um item number 32,
[00:39:01] requesting the ability to extend an
[00:39:03] existing agreement with a longtime local
[00:39:06] vendor. Uh we extended the agreement
[00:39:09] back uh earlier in the summer. Uh we had
[00:39:12] an RFP that was issued in August. That
[00:39:16] RFP has not been awarded yet, but we're
[00:39:18] asking for the ability to continue to
[00:39:20] utilize this vendor in the interim.
[00:39:24] >> So there will be a new RFP coming out in
[00:39:26] June. Is that what you said?
[00:39:27] >> There was an RF we we issued an RFP in
[00:39:30] August that has not been awarded yet.
[00:39:32] That would be in place of asking for
[00:39:34] this, you know, this one time extension
[00:39:36] and another extension if need be, that
[00:39:38] sort of thing.
[00:39:39] So when you say it hasn't been awarded,
[00:39:41] is it that whoever came with the RFP,
[00:39:45] was there RFP process? Was there did
[00:39:47] anybody respond?
[00:39:47] >> There was a there was a full RFP
[00:39:49] process. We had a tremendous we had 26
[00:39:52] or 28 responses. Takes a long time to go
[00:39:54] through them.
[00:39:55] >> Um and so it hasn't been awarded. Um
[00:39:58] we're scoring the different process, but
[00:40:02] they've come back. Yeah.
[00:40:03] >> Okay. Thank you everybody.
